message.content:
@startuml
!define PAGE(name) [«page»\nname]
!define CONTROLLER(name) [«controller»\nname]

PAGE(meetstars.html) -- "«controls»" CONTROLLER(MeetStars)
PAGE(meet_external_link_edit.html) -- "«controls»" CONTROLLER(MeetLinkEdit)
PAGE(meet_external_links_edit.html) -- "«controls»" CONTROLLER(MeetLinksEdit)
PAGE(meet_view.html) -- "«controls»" CONTROLLER(MeetView)
PAGE(talktomeetorganizer.html) -- "«controls»" CONTROLLER(TalkToMeetOrganizer)
PAGE(talktofriend.html) -- "«controls»" CONTROLLER(TalkToFriend)
PAGE(mailbox_messages.html) -- "«controls»" CONTROLLER(Conversation)
PAGE(mailboxes.html) -- "«controls»" CONTROLLER(Conversations)
PAGE(friends.html) -- "«controls»" CONTROLLER(Friends)
PAGE(user.html) -- "«controls»" CONTROLLER(Friendship)
PAGE(myaccount.html) -- "«controls»" CONTROLLER(MyAccount)

@enduml
